title: Supreme Court stays conviction, sentence of former Chhattisgarh CM's son Amit Jogi in murder case
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday stayed the conviction and life sentence of Amit Jogi, son of former Chhattisgarh Chief Minister Ajit Jogi, in a 23-year-old murder case.A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath, Sandeep Mehta and Vijay Bishnoi passed the stay order on an appeal filed by Jogi against an order of the Chhattisgarh High Court which had overturned his acquittal by trial court.Justice Vikram Nath, Justice Sandeep Mehta and Justice Vijay BishnoiThe case relates to the 2003 murder of Nationalist Con
